name: R5AgeElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Age to FHIR R4 Age
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Age to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Age.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.value` as `Equivalent`.
The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).

Element `Age.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.value` as `Equivalent`.
The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).

Element `Age.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Age.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

Element `Age.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Age.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
Element `Age.unit` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.unit` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Age.unit` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.unit` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Age.system` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.system` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Age.system` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.system` as `Equivalent`.

Element `Age.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.code` as `Equivalent`.
The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

Element `Age.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.code` as `Equivalent`.
The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

Element `Age.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Age.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Age.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
